title: Safety Net Claim Assistant
description: Streamline Safety Net entitlement checks, claim lodgement, and concession card validation for eligible patients.

title: Webster Pack Manager
description: Manage blister-pack schedules, special orders, and dispensing records for weekly and monthly Webster packs.

title: Direction Assistant
description: Generate clear, plain-language dispensing directions and counselling notes tailored to each patient's medication regimen.

title: Discharge Reports
description: Generate and manage patient discharge medication reports and summaries for seamless care transitions.
